## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO proposal and content strategy for Abnormal Security with fwd.digital team.](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital proposes a comprehensive SEO strategy combining AI-powered content creation, content refresh, and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Abnormal Security has significant untapped SEO potential, particularly in blog content optimization and glossary expansion](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Collaboration will require careful handling of proprietary/changing information due to Abnormal's upcoming rebrand and frequent product updates](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers flexible workflows to accommodate Abnormal's specific needs, including direct CMS access for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Status and Opportunities

  - [Abnormal has strong backlink profile but traffic hasn't caught up; large portion is branded](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [600,000 potential search volume with 3x traffic opportunity from existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Glossary (54 pages) driving double-digit percentage of website traffic; competitors have hundreds of pages](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [280 blog posts present significant content refresh opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)

### Content Creation Process and Workflow

  - [fwd.digital uses AI workflows and human editors for end-to-end content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Process includes research, outline generation, article creation, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Custom knowledge bases created for each client to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [5-10 pieces published weekly, adaptable based on agreed strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### Collaboration and Resource Requirements

  - [Initial 12-week process: 1-hour kickoff, 1-2 rounds of content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2063.0)
  - [Ongoing 30-minute weekly meetings (flexible frequency)](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [fwd.digital can work directly with Abnormal's content marketers](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
  - [Abnormal to provide access to CMS for publishing (Craft CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)

### Handling Proprietary and Changing Information

  - [Abnormal undergoing rebrand, frequent product updates pose challenges](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [fwd.digital can adapt workflows for mass content updates (e.g., company name change)](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Custom instructions and knowledge bases can be continuously updated](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

### Additional Services and Considerations

  - [Content refresh workflows to add SEO value to existing content](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
  - [Potential for fwd.digital to assist with optimizing Abnormal's internally-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
  - [Need to balance new content creation with optimization of existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2675.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Abnormal to review detailed proposal video sent by Abdallah](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2790.0)
  - [Jade to consider internal resources (e.g., customer success, technical writing) for providing accurate product information](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
  - [Establish process for sharing updated company/product information with fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
  - [Determine specific workflow for optimizing Abnormal's internally-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
  - [Set up access to Craft CMS for fwd.digital team](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to address any additional questions after proposal review](https://fathom.video/share/zj3JB2sbnRYLzCbGTDsbdKZz_z-W6v17?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
